response.justification: The candidate demonstrates strong software development expertise across multiple languages and platforms, but lacks direct experience with C++ in the last 10 years, focusing primarily on Node.js, TypeScript, and DLang. While they have a background in low-latency applications and embedded systems, there is no evidence of work with industrial automation, message brokers, or cloud platforms relevant to the role. Security and cybersecurity experience is not highlighted.
strengths: Strong background in low-latency, high-performance applications using D, C, and Java
Experience with event-driven architectures and microservices (GISCollective, re:cinq)
Proven leadership in mentoring, training, and agile methodologies (Altom Consulting, RIDE Capital)
concerns: Minimal recent C++ experience (last substantial C++ work was at National Instruments in 2014-2015)
No demonstrated experience with industrial automation protocols (Modbus, IEC 61850, etc.) or cloud platforms (Azure)
Security expertise (IEC 62443) and secure coding practices not evident in resume
